productName: Tasty Terps - TT BHO 1g - Blueberry Yum Yum - 1g
description: A workhorse hybrid dab: Blueberry Yum Yum run through a closed-loop butane extraction and finished to a smooth, high-potency concentrate. Efficient and hard-hitting, with notes of blueberry, mint, and berry, delivering a versatile, anytime balance.
